channel.title: Miguel's Morning Bytes
channel.description: A daily executive briefing on the news shaping AI, enterprise software, and the future of work. Each morning, Miguel's Morning Bytes walks through the top stories from across the press — frontier model launches, competitor moves, Salesforce and Agentforce headlines, hiring and labor shifts — through the lens of what a Chief Revenue Officer needs to know.
channel.itunes:author: Miguel's Morning Bytes
channel.itunes:summary: A daily executive briefing on the news shaping AI, enterprise software, and the future of work. Each morning, Miguel's Morning Bytes walks through the top stories from across the press — frontier model launches, competitor moves, Salesforce and Agentforce headlines, hiring and labor shifts — through the lens of what a Chief Revenue Officer needs to know.

item.title: June 23, 2026 — Global Tech Selloff Deepens as AI Rally Cools, SpaceX Sheds $400bn
item.description: Today's brief leads with Global Tech Selloff Deepens as AI Rally Cools, SpaceX Sheds $400bn. Also covered: Oracle Sheds 21,000 Jobs as It Continues AI-Focused Streamlining; China Takes Supercomputer Crown From U.S. For First Time Since 2017; Qualcomm Near Deal for AI Software Firm Modular at ~$4B; Trump Seeks to Boost Quantum Computing With New Executive Orders; ADP CEO: Stop Worrying About Jobs, Start Thinking About Tasks.

item.title: June 22, 2026 — Microsoft's Satya Nadella: We Can't Let AI Giants Eat the Economy
item.description: Today's brief leads with Microsoft's Satya Nadella: We Can't Let AI Giants Eat the Economy. Also covered: Is China Closing the A.I. Gap Faster Than Expected?; Getty Images Soars 200% in Early Trading After OpenAI Deal; Bain tests software takeover targets by vibecoding AI replicas; Tencent Tests AI Assistant for Its Super App WeChat in China; Microsoft and Chevron Sign 20-Year Power Deal For Texas Data Center.

item.title: June 21, 2026 — Samsung Electronics Deploys ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to Global Workforce
item.description: Today's brief leads with Samsung Electronics Deploys ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to Global Workforce. Also covered: Visa Connects with ChatGPT to Let AI Agents Automatically Make Purchases; AWS Says AI Agents Lack Business Context and Security, Launches Two Services to Patch the Gaps; Workers Are Emerging as the Next Big AI Logjam; Merz: Germany Loses 10,000–14,000 Industrial Jobs a Month; Galán Overhauls Iberdrola with a New Organizational Structure.

item.title: June 20, 2026 — Nobel Winner John Jumper to Leave Google DeepMind for Anthropic
item.description: Today's brief leads with Nobel Winner John Jumper to Leave Google DeepMind for Anthropic. Also covered: Trump Tells Axios He Doesn't See Anthropic as US Security Threat; UnitedHealth's $3 Billion AI Push Has Bots Calling Doctors; Lutnick's Anthropic Crackdown Claims New Power Over AI Models; Did Anthropic Talk Its Way Into an AI Export Ban?; EY: We Found Your Biggest AI Blind Spot. It's Called the 'Tempo Gap'.

item.title: June 18, 2026 — Amazon in Talks to Sell Custom AI Chips in Bid to Cut Nvidia's Dominance
item.description: Today's brief leads with Amazon in Talks to Sell Custom AI Chips in Bid to Cut Nvidia's Dominance. Also covered: Google DeepMind unveils plan to protect itself from its own rogue AI agents; Meta's AI gamble: Dina Powell McCormick opens door to Wall Street; Anthropic Lays Out Vision for How to Bolster AI Models' Safety; JPMorgan Chase cuts off Anthropic access for its Hong Kong staff; Microsoft, Amazon Cloud Services Face Tough EU Antitrust Law.

item.title: June 17, 2026 — OpenAI's Backers Spent $7.6M to Destroy a State Legislator. Anthropic Spent $10M to Rescue Him
item.description: Today's brief leads with OpenAI's Backers Spent $7.6M to Destroy a State Legislator. Anthropic Spent $10M to Rescue Him. Also covered: State Farm's AI Plan for Sales Agents Sparks Uproar. 'A Real Slap in the Face.'; ECB's Lagarde Warns AI Is Huge Risk for Financial Stability; Macron Seeks Way Around Trump's Ban on Anthropic's AI Models; Anthropic CEO Amodei on Compute Spend, Surpassing OpenAI; Google's Gemini-Powered AI Home Speaker Goes on Sale June 25.

item.title: June 16, 2026 — French Security Service to Replace Palantir With Local Firm
item.description: Today's brief leads with French Security Service to Replace Palantir With Local Firm. Also covered: Chipmaker Nvidia Seeks to Raise Over $25bn in First Bond Deal Since 2021; Europe's AI Champion Mistral Vulnerable to Russian Disinformation, Study Finds; How the AI Boom Turned a Buyout Deal Into One of History's Most Lucrative; Microsoft's Latest Surface PCs Offer Better Graphics, Faster AI; IBM's $17 Million DOJ Settlement Makes the Case for Civility.

item.title: June 16, 2026 — French Security Service to Replace Palantir With Local Firm
item.description: Today's brief leads with French Security Service to Replace Palantir With Local Firm. Also covered: Chipmaker Nvidia Seeks to Raise Over $25bn in First Bond Deal Since 2021; Europe's AI Champion Mistral Vulnerable to Russian Disinformation, Study Finds; How the AI Boom Turned a Buyout Deal Into One of History's Most Lucrative; Microsoft's Latest Surface PCs Offer Better Graphics, Faster AI; IBM's $17 Million DOJ Settlement Makes the Case for Civility.
